subcodes.first_line: I beseech God, exalted be His glory, for health and well-being, honor and exaltation on behalf of the gentlemen. God willing, all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از حق جل جلاله صحت و سلامتی و عزت و رفعت از برای آقایان میطلبم انشاء الله کل
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @prayer for governments and rulers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
